uplink.description: Water event, leak detected (synthetic, exercises water.leak true)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input (proto 1 / counter 2, type 0x08 WATER, state byte 0 = Water Present, relative 200). Running the upstream reference decoder on these bytes yields Water.Event 'Water Present', Relative 200; normalized here to water.leak true (the water-leak vocabulary key) plus the waterRelative diagnostic extra.

uplink.description: Water event, leak cleared (synthetic, exercises water.leak false)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input (type 0x08 WATER, state byte 1 = Water Not Present, relative 5). Running the upstream reference decoder yields Water.Event 'Water Not Present', Relative 5; normalized here to water.leak false.

uplink.description: Supervisory event: battery voltage, accumulation, batteryLow flag (synthetic)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input (type 0x01 SUPERVISORY; byte[4]=0x36 battery nibbles, byte[2]=0x02 BatteryLow flag, byte[9..10]=accumulation 5). Running the upstream reference decoder yields Battery '3.6V', BatteryLow 1, Accumulation 5; normalized to battery 3.6 V (volts per vocabulary) and camelCase flag/diagnostic extras.

uplink.description: Unsupported message type returns an error
uplink._note: Synthetic input (type 0xAB is not a defined RadioBridge event). The upstream reference decoder returns its default {Event: 'UNDEFINED'} (no normalized data); our codec reports an explicit error per the repo's standard, so expected.errors is authored here rather than taken from upstream.
